description_long: This bungalow features a single-story structure with a prominent gable roof covered in dark gray tiles. The front facade includes a large set of rectangular windows and a double garage door with horizontal paneling, both framed in a warm wood tone. A small covered porch with wooden posts and a peaked roof provides a welcoming entryway. The side and rear elevations are simpler, with minimal window openings and consistent horizontal wood siding. A dormer window is visible on the roof, adding architectural interest and likely providing light to an attic or loft space. The overall design is compact and functional, suitable for suburban or residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story bungalow with a gable roof, large front windows, a double garage, and a small covered porch, finished in wood and gray roof tiles.
description_view_0: Front view showing large windows, double garage door, covered porch, and dormer window on the roof.
description_view_1: Side view with plain wood siding and the gable roof extending over the structure, minimal window detail.
description_view_2: Rear view with a single window and a plain wooden door, simple horizontal siding and roof tiles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the gable roof and plain siding with no windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical front-facing windows with single side and rear windows
